ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

We hope you’re enjoying our services. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription to XYZ SaaS will automatically renew on 15th May 2026.

If you wish to make any changes or cancel, log in to your account at <URL>.

Thank you,
XYZ Team

spam.subject: URGENT: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your QuickBooks invoice #12345 remains unpaid. Aapke account ko permanently disable kar diya jayega agar 24 ghante ke andar payment nahi hua.

Please verify your account details and complete the payment at <URL> to avoid service interruption.

Thank you,
QuickBooks Support Team
